system.description: Fill in one of the slots in your Contacts List with the name of your academic network, and the following values: Rating: +1, Expertise: Academia, Locale: Everywhere, Relationship: Academic Network. Whenever you need a Contact that specializes in a specific academic subject, you can declare them without rolling. For a move that allows you to upgrade the Contact, you may write that Contact's specific Name and Expertise, and set the Rating to +2.
